title: Senator Brian W. Jones (R-Santee) this morning spoke out against, and voted against, Senate Bill 467 (authored by Scott Weiner, D-San Francisco and Monique Limon, D-Santa Barbara),
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Senate Bill 467 will destroy 50,000+ jobs in California.
Senate Bill 467 will make California nearly 100% reliant on foreign energy imports.
Senate Bill 467 will raise gas prices to as much as $10 per gallon.
